programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: La vida de Lorenzo en la cárcel corre peligro. Los enfrentamientos con los otros reos aumentan. Ángela es atacada por Satanás y él logra rescatarla, pero después, recibe una puñalada. Catalina finge y le hace creer a Christian que quedó paralitica.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky debe enfrentar la locura de un juego sin límite y un nombre aparece pintado en su cuerpo. Christian y Vicky le cuentan a Martín toda la verdad sobre ellos. Diana y Ernesto muestran su verdadera cara. Lorenzo no termina de salir de los problemas.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Ángela arriesga su propia vida y profesión para salvar a Lorenzo de sus verdugos. En la cárcel, él ve la muerte frente a frente. Vicky es secuestrada y consigue quitarle la máscara a uno de sus raptores, pero vuelve a sufrir la pérdida de la memoria.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo llega a la casa de Ángela, quiere volver a la cárcel para probar su inocencia. Diana le insinúa a Martín que siente celos por ella, cuando es Ernesto quien está enfermo de envidia y acusa a Martín de haberle robado a Vicky.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky duda del amor de Martín debido a las intrigas de Ernesto. Lorenzo empieza a despertar celos en el ex de Ángela. Él decide reingresar al penal, pero antes visita junto a Ángela la tumba del amor de su vida. Christian le pide perdón a Pasión.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo regresa a la cárcel para enfrentar una venganza de Satanás. Afuera de las rejas, los celos de un hombre influyente pueden poner en riesgo la defensa de Ángela. Elizabeth sospecha que Gustavo miente sobre Aurora. Vicky no quiere divorciarse.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: El miedo de una condena definitiva para Lorenzo termina en un beso con la abogada. Su caso puede salirse de las manos de Ángela por los celos del fiscal. Martín intenta evitar la partida de Vicky, todo por una trampa que les tienden Diana y Ernesto.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Los fantasmas del pasado de Lorenzo pueden convertirse en una condena perpetua. Martín impide a Vicky que viaje jurándole amor real, pero Ernesto y Diana encuentran otro motivo para separarlos. La reunión de Pasión, Catalina y Christian sale mal.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Cuando Ángela trata de armar la defensa de Lorenzo, Félix la chantajea con dejarla ganar el caso a cambio de una noche de pasión; pero ella tiene una carta bajo la manga. César y Blanca deciden darse una oportunidad. Diana intenta matar a Vicky.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: El juicio de Lorenzo inicia con un juego de testimonios encontrados. Ángela enfrenta a Félix, segura de que no ganará su caso. Una cláusula del testamento aleja a Martin de la herencia y lo pone contra las cuerdas. Catalina toma una actitud radical.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Félix se juega su mejor arma con Ernesto para hundir a Lorenzo y logra despertar su rabia con mentiras. Frente al jurado, Félix acusa a Ángela de ser la amante de su defendido. Catalina sale de la cirugía y logra sobrevivir al intento de suicidio.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo logra su libertad por un testigo desconocido que surge a última hora. Todo gracias al apoyo de Ángela, quien se enfrenta al fiscal con la fuerza que emana de un corazón ajeno. Vicky recuerda quién era el hombre enmascarado que la secuestró.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín entra en un juego peligroso buscando que una mentira revele la obsesión que tienen Ernesto y Diana contra Vicky. Para eso, acude a la oficina de Ángela en busca de apoyo. Nina encubre a César para que pueda correr en las carreras clandestinas.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Ernesto cae en manos de la ley gracias a Martín y termina confesando su obsesión por Vicky. Pasión se va con Christian a su gira, Martín y Vicky también planean irse de luna de miel, mientras Lorenzo y Ángela empiezan a pasar más tiempo juntos.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A violent gang member asks to move back to general population, following six years in segregation; a brother and sister are charged with murdering a high school football star, two years after he was stabbed to death on an Oakland street corner.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate says a bet for two cups of soup led to a horrific slashing; a case of road rage results in a murder charge for a software engineer; after two years in jail, a jury will decide if he must go to prison for life.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: One inmate learns addiction and motherhood do not make a good mix; two other inmates are left wondering which of them is the father of her child; when a feud from the streets boils over in the jail, deputies are forced to respond.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Deputies respond to rising tensions in a female housing unit; a popular rapper, whose ups and downs have been told in the Oakland media, now faces serious charges; a grandmother convicted of a mortgage scam finds her place in the inmate hierarchy.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Welcome to Limon Correctional Facility, a level 4 prison that houses many of Colorado's most dangerous inmates; while visiting Limon Correctional, the Lockup crew is greeted by angry inmates and the cell extraction team is called in to help.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: When Travis Trani took charge in 2008 he oversaw the implementation of several new policies; the restrictions on movement were among the toughest; inmates from the six different housing units could no longer freely move throughout the prison.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Prison is an underground economy, where some deals are signed in ink and others are signed in blood; a rare look at the schemes, hustles and extortions conducted behind prison walls and the consequences they carry.

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Chris Epps charms his way up the ladder, from prison guard to the top post of Mississippi Department of Corrections Commissioner. Once in office, he and his businessman buddy, Cecil McCrory set up shop, siphoning kickbacks and bribes.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Narancia is unshakable as he uses firepower and CO2 detection to survive Formaggio’s body-shrinking attack. Even beneath a spider’s fangs inside Formaggio’s bottle, Narancia reveals not Trish’s whereabouts but the bullet holes his Stand has left behind.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno, Abbacchio and Fugo travel to Pompeii to find a hidden key pivotal in their protection of Trish. Facing the trio, however, is more than the lonely remains of ancient Roman villas and colonnades. Fugo spots an odd figure in an even stranger mirror.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Illuso has pulled Fugo into his mirror world as Abbacchio rushes to retrieve the key, despite Giorno’s stern advice. But Abbacchio cannot escape a similar fate, leaving him and later Giorno to resort to self-mutilation in favor of death by laceration.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Delve into the deadly battles that mold Giorno into an indispensable member of the Passione gang as he and his allies fight to protect Trish and themselves against outlandish acts of violence by members of the Hitman team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ready to escort Trish by train, the gang finds on the platform a lone turtle lingering by the drinking fountain, just as the boss instructed. But Bucciarati is stumped—departure is imminent, the enemy is closing in, and the cryptic key appears useless.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and gang hide inside a turtle aboard their train hurtling toward Florence as Mista fights to keep Pesci's body-piercing fish hook from ensnaring his brain. Prosciutto, meanwhile, has released his Stand, rapidly aging everyone on board.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: To save his squad, Bucciarati risks all by grabbing hold of Prosciutto and hurling himself off the speeding train, only to be saved by Pesci’s hook. Now, as Pesci savagely fishes for his victim’s heart, Bucciarati’s resolve reaches stunning heights.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and crew head to Venice by car, after a near-death encounter with Pesci. Unbeknownst to them, Melone from the Hitman Team has created an atomizing ancillary Stand from Bruno’s blood and the body of an unsuspecting female train passenger.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno fights transmutation with transmutation as he weaponizes his own severed hand and imbues inanimate objects with life against Melone’s baby Stand. Giorno and team now must learn that the road ahead to Santa Lucia train station is paved with ice.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ghiaccio's Stand, White Ice is able to envelop him like a bodysuit and able to freeze everything around him to extremely low temperatures. Giorno and Mista somewhat make it to Venice, despite being partially frozen by Ghiaccio...

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On today's trip Charlie Ross and the new girl, Natasha Raskin, are making for an auction in the Hampshire village of Swanmore but starting out in the famous naval city of Portsmouth.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Halfway through the trip, Natasha Raskin and Charlie Ross begin the day in Berkhamsted, heading for an auction in the Dorset town of Christchurch.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Today finds Charlie Ross and Natasha Raskin in Farnham in Surrey, on their way to an auction in Towcester, Northamptonshire. Charlie is still in the lead, but can the rookie catch him up before they head into their final leg?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the end of the road for Charlie Ross and Natasha Raskin as they set off from Ashby De La Zouche in Leicestershire. With only a few pounds separating them, who will win at the climactic auction in Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a new week and a new pairing as Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning hit the road on the hunt for antique treasures. They begin their epic adventure in Ford, aiming for their first auction in Leyburn, North Yorkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning continue their antique adventure with Anita in the lead, having won the first auction. Can Paul catch her up as they go from the steel city of Sheffield, heading for auction in Luddendenfoot, West Yorkshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's an auction apiece for Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning as they reach the halfway point of their Antiques Road Trip. This leg sees them begin in South Cave in the East Riding of Yorkshire, aiming for auction in Twickenham, London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning head for round four at auction and they both have their eyes on the prize. Starting out in Navenby, Lincolnshire they make their way towards the penultimate auction in the Norfolk town of Diss.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for road trippers Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning. There are only a few pounds separating this competitive duo as they begin in Norwich, and head for a nail-biting final auction in Stamford, Licolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw kick off a new season in Suffolk and Cambridgeshire. Armed with £200 each, and an ailing pickup truck, they shop up a storm before heading to an auction in Market Harborough.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques hunters Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw shop across Gloucestershire and Northamptonshire before going head-to-head at an auction in Evesham, Worcestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Travelling through Hertfordshire, Buckinghamshire, and the West Midlands, Paul Laidlaw uncovers a hidden gem that could win him the trip. All is revealed when he and Christina Trevanion auction their lots in Nantwich, Cheshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw travel through Shropshire and Worcestershire. Paul gets security clearance to visit Iron Mountain and Christina learns about the origins of the modern Olympic movement in Much Wenlock.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Christina Trevanion are taking in the delights of Staffordshire and Cheshire. Paul has had amazing success on this trip; can Christina catch up as they head towards their final auction in Northwich?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the last of the series the experts visit the Corn Exchange, Brighton, to see a group of Meissen figures, a china cat with a good pedigree and an unusual drop-leaf spider table.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The people of Islington in north London bring their treasures to Roadshow, where the familiar team of experts encounter surprising extremes - from a chocolate Easter egg from the 1940s, to jewelled eggs by the great Russian jeweller Faberge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: You might expect the railway town of Darlington to produce fine model trains, but perhaps not a pair of wonderful 19th-century library globes.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Merthyr Tydfil the experts find a most unusual tea set and an important painting by the Irish artist Jack Yeats.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: There's a rich crop of valuables in this edition from Stowmarket in Suffolk. There's English delftware and glass from the 18th century; a fine watercolour by Frederick Cotman from the late 19th century.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Hexham, Northumberland, the experts discuss a fine collection of Japanese porcelain and works of art and a valuable 20th-century German painting with Cubist influences. And Hugh Scully sets another competition question.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Forgotten treasures are discovered at St Ives, Cambridgeshire, when an artist's sketchbook from an attic is identified as the work of a well known Belgian painter and worth thousands.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Both very old objects and relatively new ones turn up when the experts visit Ayr in Scotland. An 18th-century spinet and a pair of early Derby dishes contrast with a 1930s Susie Cooper coffee set and an early electric mantle clock.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Salisbury Cathedral is the setting for a feast of antiques, from the valuable to the simply curious, with rare seasoning from a set of the finest salt cellars ever seen on the show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts travel to Valletta in Malta. There's fine furniture, painting, local silver and pottery found in St Paul's Bay, probably dumped from a Roman galleon. Introduced by Hugh Scully.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Whitehaven, Cumbria, chairs rescued from a bonfire and salvaged tiles make their owner's day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Stafford, where it's a good day for ceramics furniture, painting, clocks and the finest scientific instrument yet seen on the show is discovered.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the last of the present series the experts enthuse over Pre-Columbian pots from Peru, Chinese art, English silver and American glass. Presented by Hugh Scully from the old Naval barracks church of St George at Gillingham in Kent.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully takes the experts to the gardens of Athelhampton House in Dorset, near to where the author Thomas Hardy was born. Finds include a valuable painting found in an attic, and a rare Scottish silver drinking cup.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A mother moose and her calf struggle to survive in the Canadian wilderness while facing wolves, swarms of biting flies and Arctic weather.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A look at the differing fortunes of a mother polar bear, a mother grizzly bear and their cubs, in a rapidly changing world; the shrinking Arctic ice is making life tougher for polar bears, but it is offering new opportunities for grizzly bears.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: A Winter's Tale
programme.desc: This program explores the resilience of nature on the shortest day of the year, showcasing wildlife and the insulated human world.

programme.title: Spy in the Snow
programme.desc: Behind nature's winter wonderland are some of the toughest places to survive. Hidden cameras in a new generation of Spy Creatures reveal the fascinating behaviors of animals from penguins to parrots, polar bears to otters, wallabies, and wombats.

programme.title: Wild Battlefields
programme.desc: BBC Earth brings you heart-pounding action, mind-blowing sights, and the wonder of this amazing planet we call home on Pluto TV.

programme.title: Snow Animals
programme.desc: Introducing a cast of charismatic animals to reveal the remarkable strategies they use to survive, and even thrive, in winter -- for animals this is the toughest time of year, and preparations start early.

programme.title: Snow Cats and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan joins Dr. Victor Lukarevsky in Russia to attempt to rehabilitate two pairs of lynx held captive for years.

programme.title: Snow Cats and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan returns to Russia to help Dr. Victor Lukarevsky prepare rehabilitated lynx for release back in the wild.

programme.title: When the North Wind Blows
programme.desc: The challenges of living in some of the coldest places on Earth.

programme.title: A Winter's Tale
programme.desc: This program explores the resilience of nature on the shortest day of the year, showcasing wildlife and the insulated human world.

programme.title: Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: With Britain in the grip of winter and facing the coldest temperatures of the year, wildlife must cope with the cold.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella travels to Venice to find inspiration for a glittering Christmas buffet party and returns with recipes and party ideas.

programme.title: Rachel Allen: All Things Sweet
programme.desc: Chef Rachel Allen is at home in Ireland to indulge her passion for sweet things.

programme.title: Rachel's Coastal Cooking
programme.desc: Rachel Allen takes inspiration from the Irish coast for some festive delights, including the perfect Christmas roast and some delicious festive chocolates.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond celebrates his passion for puddings, cooking dishes including riz au lait, tarte tatin and fruit crumble.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Christmas Odyssey
programme.desc: Inspired by his Far Eastern Odyssey, Chef Rick Stein livens up your holiday meals with braised duck, beef rending, biryani and a twist on turkey.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornish Christmas
programme.desc: Rick Stein enjoys Christmas in his adopted county, enjoys Wassailing, and cooks his own goose!

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornish Christmas
programme.desc: Rick Stein enjoys Christmas in his adopted county, enjoys Wassailing, and cooks his own goose!

programme.title: Rick Stein's Food Heroes
programme.desc: Rick and Chalky continue their culinary quest around the country.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Spain
programme.desc: Rick tours Spain on a journey of discovery and culinary delight; Rick begins his tour in Galicia on the Atlantic coast, driving an old camper van suitable for venturing to places off the beaten track.

programme.title: Nigella's Amsterdam Christmas
programme.desc: Nigella travels to Amsterdam to enjoy the festive season in the Venice of the North; she visits her favorite places in the Dutch capital city, picks up special ingredients for her festive feasting and makes traditional Dutch speculaas.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas
programme.desc: Mincemeat; apple-nut strudel; roast pheasant with cranberry relish.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas
programme.desc: Canapes; roast goose with prunes; braised-beef casserole; champagne jellies; chocolate truffle torte.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a near-fatal heart attack, Artie, the owner of Alibi in Las Vegas, lost his zeal for the work, and it's up to Jon to help him get it back.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon challenges the owner of a beer-only bar being undercut by a BYOB liquor policy to harness her redneck ingenuity in order to save her business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps bring a golf-themed establishment up to par by getting rid of the grime and reassessing the staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Despite initial success, the owner of Longshots lost control of his feuding bar staff and may soon lose his house if Jon can't turn things around.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A raccoon infestation is only the most extreme on a long list of problems plaguing KC's Bar & Grill and its checked-out owner.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get identical twins with identical egos to see eye-to-eye if they are to curb a dangerous over-pouring problem and save RG's Lounge in Kansas City, MO.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon looks to re-establish a sense of unity at O'Banion's in Nebraska, where a binge-drinking owner has been usurped in a hostile takeover by his partners.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the owner of an Omaha, NE, hookah bar whose money is going up in smoke thanks to his staff's frat-house ways.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The dysfunctional owners of the O Face Bar are so inexperienced and chaotic Jon doesn't even know if he wants to save their business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Ever since extended family members were put on the payroll at The Tailgate in Santa Clarita, CA, business has taken a nosedive.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Faced with a PDA-obsessed manager and an owner solely focused on his own retirement, the staff at Pat's Cocktails calls Jon for help.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Maria Menounos helps Jon scope out a bar whose owner sits around as her husband does all the work and her dad picks up the bill.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Katy, Texas, to save Bryant's Ice House, which is plagued by a bad reputation, an even worse location and a wild staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps Justin and Michael, a pair of strippers who own The End Zone bar in Houston, put aside their differences before they lose more than just their shirts.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Caroline rescue a woman who gets amnesia falling off the pier and must find her father to help her recover her memories. CJ meets a wheelchair-bound man who’s determined to get wheelchair access across the beach to the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The team is invited to Hawaii for a week to oversee new lifeguard techniques and relax a bit. Logan becomes obsessed with competing in a surfing competition. To avoid a curse, CJ and Stephanie must return a sacred lava rock to its original location.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Matt is stung by a poisonous fish, he and Mitch find a village where a young woman offers to help them, resulting in all three of them running from her jealous suitor. Logan’s selfish behavior puts his relationship with Caroline in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Kaye is reunited with old flame Wes Masters. Stephanie undergoes surgery for melanoma performed by her doctor and boyfriend Tom, who plans a romantic surprise for her when surgery is over. Caroline catches Logan cheating on her with Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While in search of underwater treasure, things take a deadly turn when Stephanie and Cody are confronted by a pair of drug smugglers. Back at headquarters, Newman faces off against a different type of treasure hunter…

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan decides to write and direct a low-budget action flick at the beach using a drugged shark as the villain, but things get out of hand when the shark Is not properly sedated!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When Mitch Judges the Miss Malibu Beach Bikini Contest, his willpower is tested by two competitors who will do anything to get his vote. Later, Cody designs the "Windjet,” an innovative, new lifesaving boat/waverunner combination.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ befriends Max, a homeless eccentric who claims that he was once a famous Hollywood Costume designer. When Max dies suddenly, CJ learns he was rich and has left her $4 million in his will. Manny joins junior lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: At the annual Baywatch Lifeguard Bachelor Auction, Mitch is "bought" for $5,000 by a wealthy socialite. The relationship gets complicated when they get stranded on an island and their social status is reversed. Cody joins a local roller hockey team.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: LA is in the throes of a severe heat wave! Hundreds of thousands of people head to the beach. Lifeguarding gets more chaotic for the team when the Secret Service shows up to inform them that the President is going to go jogging on the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: To sponsor the Special Olympics at the beach, Mitch hires MTV DJ Jenny McCarthy to throw "Beachblast:" a live televised tournament. After being evicted from his apartment, Cody moves in with CJ and Caroline, creating a surplus of sexual tension.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ's mother, a former Las Vegas showgirl, arrives in town seeking CJ's help to get away from her mobster ex-boyfriend. When CJ and her mom are held hostage on a remote beach, it is up to Mitch and Cody to rescue them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Australia's Uncle Toby's International Ironman Competition comes to LA. The Baywatch girls think all is fair in sports and convince the guys that they should compete as equals, setting the stage for a series of pranks between the men and women.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Controversy generated by Donna's appearance in Playboy magazine divides the Baywatch lifeguards. When an earthquake triggers a rockslide, burying a bus full of junior lifeguards, Mitch, Samantha, Cody and Donna try to rescue them.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Dublin as the Middleweight World Championship is on the line as Gegard 'The Dreamcatcher' Mousasi, defends his belt against the division’s top ranked contender Austin 'The Gentleman' Vanderford.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to St. Louis with an opportunity to challenge for the Bellator MMA Featherweight World Championship when hard-hitting Hungarian dynamo Adam 'The Kid' Borics clashes with Danish submission specialist Mads Burnell.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: AJ 'Mercenary' McKee puts his Bellator MMA Featherweight World Championship on the line against former world champ Patricio Pitbull in a highly anticipated rematch to determine the greatest featherweight on the planet.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to The Aloha State with undefeated phenom Juliana Velasquez putting her Bellator MMA Flyweight World Championship on the line against Liz 'Girl-Rilla' Carmouche.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back on The Big Island as Cris Cyborg puts her Bellator MMA Featherweight World Championship on the line against Arlene 'Angerfist' Blencowe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in Paris, France as Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader defends his belt against Chieck Kongo. Also, Yoel 'Soldier of God' Romero, battles it out with fast-rising contender Alex 'Eazy' Polizzi in a light heavyweight showdown.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Bellator MMA Interim Welterweight World Championship is up for grabs as Michael 'Venom' Page takes on Logan 'Storm' Storley. Also, MMA legend Lyoto 'The Dragon' Machida goes up against Fabian 'The Assassin' Edwards.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Mohegan Sun as Gegard 'The Dreamcatcher' Mousas looks to pick up the 50th win of his legendary career when he puts his Bellator MMA Middleweight World Championship on the line against powerhouse Johnny 'The Human Cheat Code' Eblen.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ashley was sexually abused by her father from ages of 5 to 18, locked in a small camper, while giving birth to four of her father's children. In her first national interview since her father's arrest, the 22-year-old mom speaks about her horrible ordeal.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues to piece together this puzzle of Robert and the women he thinks he is dating online. Now, an investigation extends to various locations to track down and verify information Robert says he has received from his “girlfriends.” Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes goes inside the unthinkable: making your own child sick to fulfill a disturbing need for attention. The idea might sound unimaginable, but for people with a psychological disorder called Munchausen by Proxy, it's irresistible.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julianne says Leighton "lied his way through life" & turned daughter, Mariah, into a liar & con artist. In a tense in-studio showdown, Julianne and couple face-off. Hotel security was called before the show, & what happened after arriving to the studio?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Many were stunned and outraged when Casey Anthony was acquitted of murder charges in her daughter Caylee's death. Lead prosecutor Jeff Ashton joins Dr. Phil to answer some hard-hitting questions about where his case went wrong.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil goes into his mailbag to answer viewers' popular questions! He has help from commedienne and author Teresa Strasser. When Teresa talks to moms on the street, find out their biggest parenting and pregnancy queries. Update on Ted Williams.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Stacey & Dan say daughter Tylor, 18, is a rageaholic who is verbally, mentally & physically abusive. They have called the police 30 times, have had Tylor arrested 10 times & now Tylor is 7 weeks pregnant! Can this family join forces for the unborn child?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil meets a hard-working nurse who says in 2013 she bought a timeshare in Cabo San Lucas. She received a call from an "an attorney" in Mexico stating there was a data breach at her resort & she was entitled to a $38,580 settlement. See what unfolds!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bleach, Keys, Bologna": all used as retaliation weapons. Dr. Phil, criminal atty Anthony Pope, & revenge expert Dr. Gina Barreca discuss--such as use of superglue on a man's private parts & also, Michael Brewer, 15, badly burned over a stolen bike. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil exposes an online dating fraud -- a catfish -- accused of duping as many as 26 women into relationships. What were the red flags the women missed? Plus, a Dr. Phil producer tracks the catfish down -- and you won’t believe who they find!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Burned by love in America, today's guests set off halfway around the world to find soul mates. Meg met David for the first time in a Romanian airport, & she says she was smitten & overcome. Now, two years into their marriage, she feels ike his slave.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ben says his wife, Kelly gained a significant amount of weight, is no longer affectionate & stopped cleaning & cooking his favorite meals 6 mos after marrying. Kelly says Ben lost 100 lbs, then became a "narcissist" & a "jerk" Can this marriage be saved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Anita & daughter Alexa say an incident 3 years ago left the family shattered: an ex-husband, a loaded gun, a little boy caught between parents & now an ex-mother-in-law who says her son is blameless & is going to court for grandson visitation rights.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monet Monico, 19, was fast becoming an acting & singing sensation, but just 2 years later, her family says the Hollywood hopeful has become a homeless heroin addict. Facing her family for the first time in 6 months, will Monet accept help?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews dive into amazing animal headlines in an all-new Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition. Then, competing viewers face-off in a Mac N Cheese cook-off you won't want to miss!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, in all new Drew Crime, Drew meets mixed martial artist Ro Malabanan.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Camilla Cabello opens-up about dating, what she's looking for in her next partner, working with relationship goals couple Gwen Stefani and Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The celebration continues, and Drew's birthday twin Rachel Dratch has a delicious surprise for her when she joinsDrew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tamera Mowry Housley opens up about sharing her spicy to-do list with her husband in her new memoir, "You Should Sit Down For This!," the possibility of a "Sister, Sister" reboot and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Las víctimas en California hacen que la UAC busque a un sospechoso que puede haber sido testigo de abuso cuando era niño.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Poder absoluto
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan a un posible asesino en serie que le envía un mensaje escalofriante a Danny, y Erin juega con la idea de postularse para el puesto de juez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La historia perfecta
programme.desc: Cuando el reportero Lorenzo Colt (Zachary Booth) es atacado mientras llevaba equipo de la policía de Nueva York en un paseo junto con Jamie y Eddie, Frank pone a Danny y Baez a la caza del tirador que puede estar buscando a otros miembros de la fuerza.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El peor de los escenarios
programme.desc: Frank se pone en alerta máxima cuando una amenaza a la ciudad de Nueva York puede ser inminente luego de un ataque terrorista en el Medio Oriente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Con amigos como estos
programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la misteriosa explosión de una ambulancia que supuestamente transporta los restos de un marine fallecido en un accidente de tráfico.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y su equipo son llamados a investigar cuando un grupo de adolescentes de excursión descubren unas placas de identificación de la Marina en un bosque nacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo son llamados cuando un estudiante adolescente de un instituto de la base de Quantico se adhiere una bomba al cuerpo y retiene a sus compañeros como rehenes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo son llamados cuando un par de niños tropiezan con el cuerpo de un marine desaparecido en un lago helado. Mientras el equipo busca pistas en el lecho helado del lago, se topan con otros tres cadáveres acribillados a balazos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC es convocado a Wisconsin en busca de un asesino serial, el equipo busca una conexión entre las víctimas para encontrar pistas del sospechoso. Además, Kate tiene dificultades para lidiar con su sobrina, Meg, cuando comienza a comportarse mal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Christine Lakin sits down with Daddy, Tiffany, and Walt to talk about reuniting for season three, view never-before-seen clips and chat with a special guest.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: This season the cast packs their bags for the Sunshine State, only to encounter some major shade. Hannah's new love interest divides the house, and with tensions high, Tiffany and Hannah funnel their way into an explosive smackdown.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: After a chaotic first night in the house, Tiffany must deal with the fallout from her fight with Hannah. Meanwhile, a backflip gone-wrong lands Murray in the hospital. And an emotional Lyle is haunted by his past relationship.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The gang barely survives a wild taxi ride with an angry Mattie, Lauren gets fed up with her shady boyfriend, and Walt & Murray's prank gets hairy.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy proves he has extra-sensory perception and predicts an exciting future for Walt. Lyle can't keep his mind off Santana and starts to think about taking their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Hurricane Martha lands on the party house and boys do their best not to let it ruin their night. The next day Mattie calls a family meeting to apologize and the housemates start airing out all their issues.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Now that the sage smoke has finally cleared the air in the house, the roommates hope that Tiffany and Lauren's boyfriends won't bring new drama when they come to visit. Bubba and Destin struggle to stay focused on their mission.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The trip to Miami gets off to a great start until the sun goes down and shots get poured. When Mattie goes missing, Don "Daddy" Johnson is on the case. Back at the house, Lyle makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle's girlfriend, Santana, comes to visit but little does she know her life is going to change forever. All of the roommates come together to plan the most perfect marriage proposal for Lyle.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle gets an answer for his proposal and the gang throws Mattie an 80s skating birthday party. Tiffany learns some troubling news about Hannah's boyfriend, Cody. Martha redecorates the boys' bedroom.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: It's the last weekend in St. Pete and the roommates want to go out with a bang. Single Lauren hits the town, Murray catches a shark, Walt brings home an animal lover and Hannah confronts Cody about his infidelity.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast gets together to rehash their latest vacation in St. Petersburg, Florida… the good, the bad, and the hurricanes.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The crew arrives at their beautiful new vacation house in Savannah, Georgia. Lauren and Tiffany struggle to keep an explosive secret from Lyle, while Murray and Hannah must console Mattie… after Daddy calls her Martha.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Tiffany and Lauren tell Lyle devastating news about his fiancée, Santana. In an attempt to woo a woman into bed, Walt plays some sweet, out-of-tune tunes on his guitar. Daddy brings the wrong girl home from the bar.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Murray wraps up his personal business in Mississippi and returns to the house to learn that the girls are still all up in Lyle and Santana's relationship. Murray convinces Santana to come visit so the couple can talk face to face & figure things out.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin kicks off season three with eight badasses who will go head to head in three bust ass challenges. The last man standing will earn the right to take on the Skullbuster for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/08/2016. Meet the Latinos of East Lost Angeles who are fighting to live the American dream while facing prejudice and intolerance.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/15/2016. W. Kamau Bell visits Camden, New Jersey, to see if a new way of policing helped change the relationship between law enforcement and the people.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/22/2016. What’s it like living off the grid? W. Kamau Bell travels to North Carolina and Tennessee to see what it takes.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/29/2016. Kamau visits people in Portland, Oregon, to discover how hipsters and gentrification have affected their neighborhoods.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 06/05/2016. Discover life above the Arctic Circle and learn about the Inuit customs and traditions the natives are trying to preserve.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 06/12/2016. Kamau heads to Daytona Beach, Florida, to see how spring breakers and retirees are getting the most out of life.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 04/24/2016. W. Kamau Bell heads down south to meet with members of the Ku Klux Klan looking to rebrand their message.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/01/2016. Hear the stories of men who’ve spent a lifetime in prison at San Quentin and see who they’ve become behind bars.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2019. Dr. Sanjay Gupta travels to Japan to see how inhabitants of Tokyo deal with work-induced stress and to learn why people in Okinawa live such long lives.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2019. While in India, Dr. Sanjay Gupta explores the connection between the reemergence of traditional Indian health techniques, Ayurveda and Yoga.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2019. To explore the benefits of living at high altitude for heart health, Dr. Sanjay Gupta heads into the Andes of Bolivia.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 05/04/2019. Dr. Sanjay Gupta explores the dark, desolate and chilly regions of Northern Norway to find out how Norwegians have unlocked the secret to happiness.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 05/11/2019. In a country otherwise known for its vices, Dr. Gupta finds a powerful tradition of food, family and faith contributes to Italy’s health.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/05/2014. Lisa Ling unpacks how prescription drug addiction has taken root in one of the most clean-living communities in America.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/12/2014. Lisa Ling visits the progeny of a millionaire, who “bred for intelligence,” to find out if you can really engineer a generation of smart children.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/19/2014. Lisa Ling explores the booming oil industry in North Dakota as more women seek opportunity in the area despite hardship, hard labor and danger.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/26/2014. Lisa Ling uncovers why thousands of Americans are flocking to the Amazon rainforest to drink a psychedelic plant mixture called ayahuasca.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist leads officers on a high-speed chase, a dead car battery won't stop a man from eluding the police, and a wanted driver fails to avoid an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A brokenhearted man sends deputies on a dangerous pursuit through town, officers uncover a weapon during a traffic stop, and a woman is detained for driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in hiding is sniffed out quickly by the K-9 unit, a couple gets caught lying when an officer recognizes them, and a woman's dogs save her a trip to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when he was signaled to stop. Officers investigate a call regarding a suspicious parked car. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mother with an arrest warrant is apprehended after trying to evade police, a repeat traffic offender commits multiple offenses, and cops respond to a domestic abuse case.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A convenience store sprinter bets officers he'll get away next time, matching bullets help solve an armed robbery, and a trucker takes his family on a supersized car chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police are led on a lengthy chase, a man is pulled over in a new car he doesn't own, and a detained woman has choice words about her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team arrives at a car crash, they find three casualties and a human brain that doesn't belong to any of the victims.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates three seemingly unrelated murders, they discover someone is getting revenge for cold case murders that were never solved.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team discovers a deceased rancher was also a ballistics expert, they have to work with the FBI to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the body of a naked dead man is discovered by Dr. Robbins' wife in their master bedroom, it leads to a lot of questions for the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Willows works with the FBI again after a professional hit occurs at a law firm she's recommended to her friend.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team says goodbye to Catherine Willows as she makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead and her hair is done up '70s style complete with vintage clothes, the CSI team discovers clues that point to a killer with a hair fetish.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell asks for advice from a former colleague on a case involving the death of a man's ex-girlfriend. Elisabeth Shue Joins The Cast As New CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a house is stolen completely off its foundation, the CSIs are on the case in search of answers. Meanwhile, new CSI Julie Finlay showcases her skill in blood analysis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a blackout cripples the city, the CSIs must revert to old-school methods to solve the case of a missing child.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are brought in to solve the case of a recently murdered student whose death photo ends up trending on the Internet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team is called in to investigate a robbery-homicide at an "Alice In Wonderland"-themed wedding, they have little to work with to find a killer. (Jaclyn Smith guest stars)

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team is called in to investigate a man who is shot at point-blank range in a local casino, they shut down the entire building to find their killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Stokes learns that a man he helped put in prison is going to have his conviction overturned, the CSI team needs to prove the killer is guilty again or he will be released.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una desconocida cerca de las extrañas atracciones de un espectáculo itinerante inspirado en el siglo XIX, el equipo investiga un elenco de personajes inusuales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI llega a un accidente automovilístico, encuentran tres víctimas y un cerebro humano que no pertenece a ninguna de las víctimas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga tres asesinatos aparentemente no relacionados, descubren que alguien se está vengando por asesinatos de casos sin resolver que nunca se resolvieron.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI descubre que un traficante fallecido también era un experto en balística, tienen que trabajar con el FBI para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa del Dr. Robbins descubre el cuerpo de un hombre muerto desnudo en su dormitorio principal, el equipo de CSI se hace muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Willows vuelve a trabajar con el FBI después de que ocurre un golpe profesional en un bufete de abogados que ella recomendó a su amiga.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se despide de Catherine Willows mientras toma una decisión que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer es encontrada muerta y su cabello arreglado al estilo de los años 70 y ropa vintage, el equipo de CSI descubre pistas que apuntan a un asesino con un fetiche por el cabello.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell pide consejo a una antigua colega sobre un caso relacionado con la muerte de la exnovia de un hombre. Elisabeth Shue se une al elenco como la nueva CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una casa es totalmente robada de sus cimientos, el equipo de CSI busca respuestas. Mientras tanto, la nueva CSI Julie Finlay muestra su habilidad en el análisis de sangre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón paraliza la ciudad, el equipo de CSI debe volver a los métodos de la vieja escuela para resolver el caso de un niño desaparecido.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para resolver el caso de un estudiante asesinado recientemente de quien la foto de su muerte termina siendo tendencia en internet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar un robo y homicidio en una boda con el tema de “Alicia en el país de las maravillas”, no tienen mucho con qué trabajar para hallar al asesino. (Estrella invitada Jaclyn Smith)

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar a un hombre a quien le disparan a quemarropa en un casino local, cerraron todo el edificio en busca del asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When one of the CSI's biggest enemies is murdered, Horatio must determine which of his team members is a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Megan Donner returns to the CSI unit in time to work on a jet crash in the Everglades. They discover a victim five miles from the crash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After fishermen catch a tiger shark and discover a partial human torso in its stomach, evidence leads the team to suspect murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a rape and a murder takes place on a Miami beach, Horatio and the team are sent to investigate the mansion of the Hamilton family.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When his mentor is killed while defusing a bomb, Horatio goes on a personal mission to find the culprit. Megan wonders if he is too close to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a priest is murdered, Horatio and the team must investigate. A lip print on a drinking glass sets a 12-year-old altar boy as a prime suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A 5-year-old girl is murdered at a restaurant/playland catering to parents and children, and Horatio and the team must investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate the murder of a male stripper found dead after a female sex party. Evidence suggests he had sex prior to his death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a family is slaughtered in their home, Horatio and the team try to find the killer with the evidence left at the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Three people are shot and killed in downtown Miami during rush hour and Horatio and the team must catch the killer fast.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A professor from a local university is found hanging from a tree after being tortured, she had been tortured for at least 4 hours before the hanging.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an unidentified girl is found dead near a very strict rehabilitation camp, Horatio and the team investigate her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are called to investigate when a prostitute is found stabbed to death and stuffed under a bed after the body was cleaned.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When it's revealed that a ring of underground labs are manufacturing deadly drugs, Horatio and Speedle investigate the situation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Los Everglades de Florida infestados de caimanes y serpientes se convierten en la zona cero de una serie de asesinatos inconexos, justo cuando los incendios arrasan el raro ecosistema.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño avión choca contra un vecindario residencial, los restos revelan un cadáver en la bodega de carga, junto con medio millón de dólares en efectivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El mundo de los videos extremos de patinetas se vuelve mortal cuando la competencia se acalora dentro del estudio. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La temporada de impuestos comienza con todo cuando dos agentes de Hacienda aparecen muertos. Llaman a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El club nocturno más sexy de South Beach en Miami se convierte en un hervidero de venganza cuando un asesinato cierra las puertas de un servicio de citas único.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una niña de ocho años se convierte en el peón inocente de un juego feo y abusivo que termina en asesinato. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un reencuentro de la escuela secundaria se vuelve mortal cuando un compañero de clase se deja llevar por un resentimiento de 15 años, Horatio y Yelina descubren que Ray aún puede estar vivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI trabaja contrarreloj para encontrar al supuesto cómplice en un caso de asesinato con hacha de hace años antes de que se ejecute al asesino convicto.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI corre contra el tiempo para localizar y desactivar una bomba radiactiva que estallará en medio del centro de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrentan a la infame y mortal pandilla Mala Noche de Miami después de que un funeral se convierte en el escenario de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un accidente de navegación familiar revela un siniestro complot de estafadores para robar diez millones de dólares en lingotes de oro. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de una adolescente que estaba de fiesta en Miami de camino a las Bahamas con su clase de secundaria.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un joven enfrenta cadena perpetua, y posiblemente algo peor, a menos que Horatio pueda probar su inocencia contra adversidades insuperables.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo corren contra el tiempo para descubrir quién está tratando de incriminar a Horatio por el asesinato de una mujer con la que ha estado saliendo.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the lingerie league is found murdered in a hot tub, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in Central Park the CSI New York team is lured into the mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a car racing legend dies in a fiery explosion, the CSI New York team of investigators discovers that car tampering is the cause.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When four victims are found dead in a hotel room and the main suspect turns up wielding an ax, the CSIs try to piece together the details.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two young journalists are found dead on the eve of St. Patrick's Day, the CSIs try to find the clue at the end of the rainbow.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead, the evidence and autopsy both suggest suicide, but Stella is unconvinced and risks her life to pursue the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A death row inmate's final request brings Hawkes to a Pennsylvania prison and face-to-face with a personal secret just as a prison riot erupts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The shooting of a 14-year-old boy in front of his 12-year-old brother takes Detective Mac Taylor’s drive for justice to another level.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a slab of concrete starts bleeding in midtown, the CSIs' investigation takes them into an underground world of hardcore fighting.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After being injured, Mac watches his neighbors while recuperating and witnesses mysterious activity that leads to murder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators follows a trail left by Shane Casey and realizes he is targeting a vacationing Danny out of revenge.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The newest CSI New York team of investigators’ team members is welcomed by stumbling upon a woman murdered in the NYPD crime lab building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman appears to be strangled while in a live online chat that Adam witnesses the CSIs must determine if it was real or a hoax.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a couple is found beaten in their home, the CSIs think they have the suspect after a mother ID's her son, but all is not what it seems.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fantasmas del pasado (S9 Ep10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga un bar clandestino inspirado en la década de 1920 cuando asesinan a uno de sus dueños y desaparecen 10.000 dólares.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Control P (S9 Ep11)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se enfrenta a un misterio desconcertante cuando dos víctimas diferentes están vinculadas por la misma arma poco común.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mentiras piadosas (S9 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando un querido oficial de policía de Nueva York fuera de servicio fallece en un robo, el equipo de CSI usa el arte del interrogatorio para doblegar a sus sospechosos y llegar a la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El edificio 913 (S9 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando encuentran a un hombre enmascarado al pie de un rascacielos de mala fama conocido por su historia de muertes misteriosas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oro blanco (S9 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran a un joven pizzero, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York debe determinar qué buscaban realmente los perpetradores.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Seth y Apep (S9 Ep15)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo se asocian con D.B. Russell para aventajar a los secuestradores de Christine antes de que se les acabe el tiempo para salvarle la vida.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mi sangriento Valentín (S9 Ep16)
programme.desc: En el Día de San Valentín, el detective Mac Taylor y el resto del equipo de CSI de Nueva York abordan tres retorcidas historias de amor que salieron mal.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La vida es hoy (S9 Ep17)
programme.desc: El malestar de la comunidad debido a un policía que mató a un hombre desarmado obliga a Mac y al equipo de CSI de Nueva York a actuar rápidamente para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor descubre el cuerpo de una mujer en Brooklyn Heights, cuando su investigación lo lleva a un asesino en serie.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor y Danny Messer van bajo tierra y entran al mundo de los hombres que excavan bajo la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La misión de los detectives Stella Bonasera y Danny Messer de encontrar a un violador brutal se ve obstaculizada, ya que la víctima no recuerda el ataque.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una broma pesada se convierte en un misterio de un asesinato que abarca un siglo cuando un esqueleto colocado en un autobús turístico resulta ser auténtico.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI Investiga cuando el DJ más popular de Nueva York es encontrado muerto minutos antes de ser coronado campeón indiscutible de scratching.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El brutal apuñalamiento de una joven lleva a los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera a Stuyvesant Town, el epicentro de la clase media de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Richard y Janet tiene una condición física en el rostro que afecta su salud. También, Leonardo incineró los cuerpos de sus padres para fundirlos en una vajilla.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Nikanol se casó en Venezuela, al llegar a Estados Unidos descubrió que su mujer se volvió a casar y falleció. Él reclama la herencia. Además, Lina e Iván están separados, pero seguían juntos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El esposo de Nelsi murió por la infección que le provocó la bombita para tener sexo. Por otro lado, Luis se cambió de género, años más tarde se arrepiente y regresa a lo que siempre fue.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Patricia fue acogida por Amador cuando llegó de Cuba, ahora él depende de ella. En otro caso, Claribel quiere que su hija María desaloje su casa, pues acusó de abuso a su padre.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rossalba es una loca controladora que persigue y vigila a su esposo Jayjay en todos sus movimientos. También, Vicente lucra con una asociación que lleva el nombre de su nieta desaparecida.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Juan y su mujer se asfixiaban hasta llegar al orgasmo, hasta que él la mató. Por otro lado, Keno y Joel contratan a Jessi para ser la actriz de su videoclip, pero ella resultó ser transexual.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Amanda quiere emanciparse para casarse con un hombre mucho mayor que ella e inválido, su padre se opone. También, Michelle se enamora de Alex y lo trae a Estados Unidos, ella sospecha algo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Eduardo tiene una casa, en su país, que alquilaba a sus hermanos; estos vendieron la propiedad varias veces. También, Ulises tiene una cafetería que está a punto de quebrar por su hijo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Natalia descubre a su marido con una amante, sacó el palo de una cortina y se lo introdujo por el ano a su marido. Daniel descubrió que su hija de 12 años planea tener sexo con su novio.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Fabiola es dueña de un salón de eventos y se niega a celebrar la boda de Pedro con su novio. También, Rubén y Joanna fueron pareja, pero en una reconciliación ella grabó todo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Oscar y su pareja decidieron alquilar un vientre para tener hijos, pero el chico murió. También, los hijos de Ricardo descubrieron que su mamá es una narcotraficante de renombre.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: A Isabel la atraparon en la frontera de Tijuana con 50 libras de marihuana, dice que eso no es suyo. También, Alejandro se entera que su esposa Tania está operada de un padecimiento congénito vaginal.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Lisa y Antonia fueron estafadas por una empresa que les prometió formación y trabajo. En otro caso, Carolina cuida a Tony solo como enfermera, pero él tiene erecciones cuando ella se acerca.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Las hijas de Gina y Piedad van en un auto que sufrió un accidente donde muere la hija de Piedad. Además, dos jóvenes se disponen a hacer el último reto de moda con agua hirviendo.

programme.title: Psycho Kitty
programme.desc: Gemma and John would love to have visitors but cat Calisto has other ideas. She prefers a quiet life - she won't even let John play the guitar!

programme.title: The Litter: The Litter

programme.title: Frasier
